title: Snug
description: A modpack with a snug atmosphere.
body:
A modpack made for friends, this pack is there for a cozy atmosphere and warm vibes. Meant to run well on most recent systems, and with ease on modern ones.

This pack has a lot of content for building and farming, and comes with Origins and CPM installed.

As this is an unlisted pack made for friends, anyone who wants to use with additional Origins or mods can contact me.
